title: Navigating the ESG & Sustainability Landscape Series
content:
## Navigating the ESG & Sustainability Landscape Series

### Many Shades of Green: Mitigating Evolving Civil and Regulatory Greenwashing Litigation Risk
McCarthy Tétrault is pleased to invite you to the next session of our exclusive Navigating the ESG & Sustainability Landscape Series. In this session, we will be discussing the growing civil and regulatory greenwashing litigation risk landscape, evolving ESG disclosure regimes and ways to minimize exposure.
- Wendy Berman , Partner and Head of National Securities Litigation Group, McCarthy Tétrault
- Nikiforos Iatrou , Partner, Competition/Antitrust and Foreign Investment, McCarthy Tétrault
- Johanna Superina , Deputy Director, Enforcement Branch, Ontario Securities Commission
- Ljiljana Stanic , Associate, Litigation, McCarthy Tétrault
Note : The presentation will take place in person in our Toronto office and via webinar nationally, in English only. Please select your preferred location when registering. All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be shared a few days before the event.
For information about this seminar, please email clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
This program qualifies for up to 1.5 hours of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education : This program contains up to 1.5 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
11:30 a.m. — Registration and lunch 12:00 p.m. — Seminar Begins 1:30 p.m. — Seminar Concludes
